subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of the Spirit that have descended upon the Pen of Eternity from the presence of God, the Most High, the All-Wise, wherein lieth that which causeth hearts to soar [3.5s]... ...It will shine resplendently within another globe, as predestined by Him who is the Omnipotent, the Ancient of Days
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الروح نزلت علی قلم البقا من لدی الله العلی الحکیم و فیها ما تطیر به افئده
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort
